description: Main learning videos for understanding AM and PM: morning time vs afternoon/evening time, 12-hour clock, and how a full day has 24 hours split into two halves

videos.title: AM and PM | Telling Time with the Minute Monsters
videos.description: What is AM and what is PM? Learn the difference between morning time (AM) and afternoon/evening time (PM) with the fun Minute Monsters! Understand how a day has 24 hours split into two halves.
learningObjectives: Understand AM means morning time (midnight to noon)
Understand PM means afternoon/evening time (noon to midnight)
Know that a full day has 24 hours split into 12 hours AM and 12 hours PM

questions.question: You eat dinner at 7 in the evening. Is that AM or PM?

standard.description: For students who scored >= 80% on readiness
